name: ARPA-H announced PROSPR healthspan awardees
summary: ARPA-H announced seven PROSPR performer teams funded to build healthspan biomarkers, decentralized trial infrastructure, and therapeutic programs for aging-related outcomes.
significance_note: Marks a major public-program investment in healthspan biomarkers, clinical-trial design, and therapeutic testing. It is program activity, not evidence that any funded intervention improves aging outcomes.

surface_routing.rationale: Government healthspan program activity should be considered during State of the Field and trial-horizon review, without changing evidence or outlook surfaces.
